reviews.name: Ahmed Al-Rashid
reviews.text: Best grilled fish in Riyadh! Fresh, flavorful, and excellent service every time.

reviews.name: Fatima Hassan
reviews.text: The seafood platter is amazing. My family loves coming here for weekend dinners.

reviews.name: Mohammad S.
reviews.text: Authentic taste, generous portions, and the butterfly shrimp is to die for!
